title: lysimachia japonica subsp. japonica
intro: Lysimachia japonica subsp. japonica, also known as Japanese golden thread or yellow loosestrife, is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lysimachia japonica subsp. japonica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall well-being. Lysimachia japonica subsp. japonica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to support the digestive system and boost the immune system.
